ddls:
CREATE TABLE "components" (
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each component */,
  "part_number" TEXT /* Part number of the component */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the component */,
  "component_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component type (e.g., IC, capacitor, resistor) */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Name of the manufacturer */,
  "manufacturer_part_number" TEXT /* Part number assigned by the manufacturer */,
  "tolerance" TEXT /* Tolerance of the component (e.g., ±1%) */,
  "operating_temperature_range" TEXT /* Operating temperature range (e.g., -40°C to 125°C) */,
  "storage_temperature_range" TEXT /* Storage temperature range (e.g., -55°C to 150°C) */,
  "package_type" TEXT /* Package type (e.g., DIP, SMD) */,
  "pin_count" INTEGER /* Number of pins */,
  "dimensions" TEXT /* Physical dimensions of the component (e.g., 5x5x1.5mm) */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the component in grams */,
  "date_code" TEXT /* Date code (e.g., 202345) */,
  "rohs_compliant" INTEGER /* Indicates if the component is RoHS compliant */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation date of the component record */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update date of the component record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_components_component_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_type_id") REFERENCES component_types ("component_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_types" (
  "component_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each component type */,
  "component_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the component type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the component type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation date of the component type record */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update date of the component type record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("component_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "material_declarations" (
  "material_declaration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each material declaration */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component the material declaration belongs to */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material used in the component */,
  "declaration" TEXT /* Material declaration details */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation date of the material declaration */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update date of the material declaration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("material_declaration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_material_declarations_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reliability_data" (
  "reliability_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reliability data point */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component the reliability data belongs to */,
  "reliability_type" TEXT /* Type of reliability data (e.g., MTBF, FIT) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the reliability data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation date of the reliability data */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update date of the reliability data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reliability_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reliability_data_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pin_package_drawings" (
  "pin_package_drawing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pin/package drawing */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component the pin/package drawing belongs to */,
  "drawing_type" TEXT /* Type of drawing (e.g., PDF, DWG) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the pin/package drawing */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation date of the pin/package drawing */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update date of the pin/package drawing */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pin_package_drawing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pin_package_drawings_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cad_symbols_footprints_3d_models" (
  "cad_symbol_footprint_3d_model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each CAD symbol, footprint, or 3D model */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component the CAD symbol, footprint, or 3D model belongs to */,
  "symbol_type" TEXT /* Type of CAD symbol, footprint, or 3D model (e.g., Eagle, KiCad) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the CAD symbol, footprint, or 3D model */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation date of the CAD symbol, footprint, or 3D model */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update date of the CAD symbol, footprint, or 3D model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cad_symbol_footprint_3d_model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cad_symbols_footprints_3d_models_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the supplier */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the supplier */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the supplier */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the supplier */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation date of the supplier record */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update date of the supplier record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "supplier_components" (
  "supplier_component_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier-component pair */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the component from the supplier */,
  "inventory_level" INTEGER /* Current inventory level of the component at the supplier */,
  "lead_time" INTEGER /* Lead time for the component in days */,
  "min_order_quantity" INTEGER /* Minimum order quantity */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation date of the supplier-component pair */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update date of the supplier-component pair */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_supplier_components_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_supplier_components_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "supplier_component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier-component pair being ordered */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the component ordered */,
  "expected_delivery_date" TEXT /* Expected delivery date of the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, received) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation date of the order */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update date of the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_supplier_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_component_id") REFERENCES supplier_components ("supplier_component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory entry */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component in inventory */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Current quantity of the component in inventory */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the inventory (e.g., warehouse A, shelf 1) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation date of the inventory entry */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update date of the inventory entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, manager) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation date of the user record */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update date of the user record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the component data */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the component data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the component data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation date of the access log entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_revisions" (
  "revision_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each revision */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component being revised */,
  "revision_date" TEXT /* Date the revision was made */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the changes made in the revision */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the revision */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the revision */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who approved the revision */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date the revision was approved */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation date of the revision */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update date of the revision */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("revision_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_revisions_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component the document belongs to */,
  "document_type" TEXT /* Type of document (e.g., datasheet, application note) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the document */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the document */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the document */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who approved the document */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date the document was approved */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation date of the document */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update date of the document */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_documents_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_keywords" (
  "keyword_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each keyword */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component the keyword belongs to */,
  "keyword" TEXT /* Keyword associated with the component */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation date of the keyword */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update date of the keyword */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("keyword_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_keywords_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)
